title: Are ALIENS really at Area 51?
summary: This interview segment discusses a deathbed testimony from Albert Stein, who claimed to have been a US Army clerk typist assigned to Project Blue Book, describing an alleged encounter with an extraterrestrial being at S4 near Area 51.

key_claims.claim: Albert Stein was a US Army clerk typist assigned to Project Blue Book
Project Blue Book personnel were taken to Area 51 and S4
An extraterrestrial being approximately 5.5-6 feet tall wearing a light blue jumpsuit was kept in a room with a two-way mirror at S4
Albert Stein made this disclosure on his deathbed
